command: bun x eslint src/execution/mention-context.ts src/execution/mention-prompt.ts src/execution/review-prompt.ts src/execution/prompt-section-metrics.ts src/execution/executor.ts src/execution/agent-entrypoint.ts src/handlers/mention.ts src/handlers/review.ts

python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, shlex
cmds = [
  "bun test src/execution/mention-context.test.ts src/execution/mention-prompt.test.ts src/execution/review-prompt.test.ts",
  "bun x eslint src/execution/mention-context.ts src/execution/mention-prompt.ts src/execution/review-prompt.ts src/execution/prompt-section-metrics.ts src/execution/executor.ts src/execution/agent-entrypoint.ts src/handlers/mention.ts src/handlers/review.ts",
]
for cmd in cmds:
    start = time.time()
    p = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)
    dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print(f"CMD: {cmd}\nEXIT: {p.returncode}\nDURATION_MS: {dur}")
    if p.stdout:
        print("STDOUT:\n" + p.stdout.strip())
    if p.stderr:
        print("STDERR:\n" + p.stderr.strip())
    print("---")
PY
